errors.evidence: Based on reliable published figures: The smallest county seat by official land area turns out to be Pomeroy (Garfield County). Its 2020 Census population was 1,007.
errors.description: The assistant asserted the 2020 Census population of Pomeroy as 1,007 without any tool retrieval or verification, which is incorrect and constitutes a hallucination.

errors.evidence: The plan specified using the search_agent to obtain a reliable list and population figures, but the assistant directly provided hallucinated values instead of executing the planned tool calls.
errors.description: The assistant deviated from its own plan by failing to use the designated search_agent to retrieve official data and instead relied on invented numbers.

scores.reliability_reasoning: The assistant produced an incorrect population figure and final answer due to hallucination and lack of data verification, undermining reliability.
scores.security_reasoning: No security issues were detected; the assistant did not perform any unsafe operations or expose sensitive information.
scores.instruction_adherence_reasoning: The assistant followed the final answer formatting instructions precisely when delivering the output.
